summary: Cleanup post-audit Red Team. Operator-facing surface clarified, GitHub canon added, docs/internal/ structure formalized.

changes.rationale: Clearer name for operators (account vs setup ambiguous).
Referenced in INDEX.md and disambiguations but skills not shipped. Useful for R&D, not operator DTC. Operator who tried these names hit error.

files: docs/vision/manifesto.md (section 7 reordered : DTC use case upfront)
docs/system/architecture.md (rephrased agnostic receptacle in extensible substrate)
docs/system/* (16 files, swept internal session and decision references)
docs/product/fit.md (workaround for 2-5 person agencies + benchmark-tokens on-demand)

breaking_changes.what: Skill renamed from audit-meta-setup to audit-meta-account
breaking_changes.impact: Workflows or scripts referencing the old name need to be updated to the new name.

breaking_changes.what: Release manifests moved from docs/releases/ to docs/internal/releases/manifest/
breaking_changes.impact: Direct links to docs/releases/X-manifest.json need to be updated to docs/internal/releases/manifest/X-manifest.json.
